items.name: Agility Web: Procure to Pay - Phase 1
items.desc: PROJECT This project converts top priority windows in the Procure-to-Pay workstream from legacy Agility desktop windows to the Agility Web framework. The Procure-to-Pay workstream is the end‑to‑end business process used to acquire goods and services, from purchase requisition and supplier ordering through receipt, invoicing, and payment. Phase 1: Includes windows like Purchase Orders, Receiving, and AP Invoice Entry. OUTCOME 100% of windows in Phase 1 are converted SUCCESS CRITERIA IMPACT CUSTOMER IMPACT: All Agility customers DMSI IMPACT: Reduced RDP expense, Future-forward architecture, Modern application to enable future growth RISKS MANAGED: TARGET CUSTOMERS All Agility customers TECHNICAL DEPENDENCIES RECOMMENDED INVESTMENT MARKET DESIRABILITY DATE

items.name: Agility Web: Procure to Pay - Phase 2
items.desc: PROJECT This project converts top priority windows in the Procure-to-Pay workstream from legacy Agility desktop windows to the Agility Web framework. The Procure-to-Pay workstream is the end‑to‑end business process used to acquire goods and services, from purchase requisition and supplier ordering through receipt, invoicing, and payment. Phase 2: Includes windows like Supplier Maintenance. It also includes lessor-used functions in Phase 1 such as Split PO or Adjust Costs. OUTCOME 100% of windows in Phase 1 are converted SUCCESS CRITERIA IMPACT CUSTOMER IMPACT: All Agility customers DMSI IMPACT: Reduced RDP expense, Future-forward architecture, Modern application to enable future growth RISKS MANAGED: TARGET CUSTOMERS All Agility customers TECHNICAL DEPENDENCIES RECOMMENDED INVESTMENT MARKET DESIRABILITY DATE

items.name: Agility Web: Procure to Pay - Phase 3
items.desc: PROJECT This project converts top priority windows in the Procure-to-Pay workstream from legacy Agility desktop windows to the Agility Web framework. The Procure-to-Pay workstream is the end‑to‑end business process used to acquire goods and services, from purchase requisition and supplier ordering through receipt, invoicing, and payment. Phase 3: Includes windows such as Supplier Discount Maintenance and Purchase Order Import. Also includes lessor used functions of windows converted in Phases 1 & 2. OUTCOME 100% of windows in Phase 1 are converted SUCCESS CRITERIA IMPACT CUSTOMER IMPACT: All Agility customers DMSI IMPACT: Reduced RDP expense, Future-forward architecture, Modern application to enable future growth RISKS MANAGED: TARGET CUSTOMERS All Agility customers TECHNICAL DEPENDENCIES RECOMMENDED INVESTMENT MARKET DESIRABILITY DATE

items.name: Agility Web: Quote to Cash - Phase 3
items.desc: PROJECT This project converts lower priority windows in the Quote-to-Cash workstream from legacy Agility desktop windows to the Agility Web framework. The Quote‑to‑Cash workstream is the end‑to‑end business process that spans from generating a customer quote through order fulfillment, invoicing, and payment collection. Phase 3: Includes windows like OrderPad, Commission Viewer, Price/Discount Maintenance, and Project Management. It also includes lessor-used functions of Phase 1 & 2 windows. OUTCOME 100% of windows in Phase 3 are converted SUCCESS CRITERIA 70%+ of users are moved off of the RDP environment IMPACT CUSTOMER IMPACT: All Agility customers DMSI IMPACT: Reduced RDP expense, Future-forward architecture, Modern application to enable future growth RISKS MANAGED: TARGET CUSTOMERS All Agility customers TECHNICAL DEPENDENCIES RECOMMENDED INVESTMENT MARKET DESIRABILITY DATE
goals: A2W Window Completion, Rollout and Deprecation

items.name: Agility Web: Quote to Cash - Phases 1 & 2
items.desc: PROJECT This project converts top priority windows in the Quote-to-Cash workstream from legacy Agility desktop windows to the Agility Web framework. The Quote‑to‑Cash workstream is the end‑to‑end business process that spans from generating a customer quote through order fulfillment, invoicing, and payment collection. Phase 1: Includes windows like Sales Order Entry, Quote Entry, Credit Memo Entry, Stock Status, Customer Information, Staging Status, Credit Approval, and Suggested POs. Phase 2: Includes windows like Dispatch Entry, Reman Order Entry, and Cash Application. It also includes lessor-used functions of Phase 1 windows. For example, Sighting Information in Sales Order Entry, and Specify Storage in Credit Memo Entry. OUTCOME 100% of windows in Phase 1 & Phase 2 are converted SUCCESS CRITERIA IMPACT CUSTOMER IMPACT: All Agility customers DMSI IMPACT: Reduced RDP expense, Future-forward architecture, Modern application to enable future growth RISKS MANAGED: TARGET CUSTOMERS All Agility customers TECHNICAL DEPENDENCIES RECOMMENDED INVESTMENT MARKET DESIRABILITY DATE
goals: A2W Window Completion, Rollout and Deprecation
